Package com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl

Class GenericSamlIdentityProvider

java.lang.Object
com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl.GenericSamlIdentityProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
IdentityProvider
@ApplicationScoped public class GenericSamlIdentityProvider extends Object implements IdentityProvider
Basic implementation for SAML 2.0 Identity Providers.

    • authenticate

      public Optional<Map<String,Object>> authenticate(Map<String,Object> credentials)
      Description copied from interface: IdentityProvider
      Authenticates a user against the 3rd-party provider.
      Specified by:
      authenticate in interface IdentityProvider
      Parameters:
      credentials - Map of credentials (e.g., username/password or external token).
      Returns:
      Map containing user information if successful.

    • getGroups

      public List<String> getGroups(String userId)
      Description copied from interface: IdentityProvider
      Retrieves group memberships for a user from the provider.
      Specified by:
      getGroups in interface IdentityProvider
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique identifier of the user.
      Returns:
      List of groups the user belongs to.
